block.rocketnautics.rocket_thruster.tool: Found in a dumpster behind the VAB. It theoretically provides thrust, but mostly just turns Lava into noise.
rocketnautics.tooltip.rocket_thruster.ex: Requires Lava. Controlled by Pump RPM. Explosions are statistically probable.
block.rocketnautics.vector_thruster.tool: Engineers discovered that if you wiggle the engine, the rocket goes a different way. Revolutionary.
rocketnautics.tooltip.vector_thruster.ex: Steerable. Tilt controlled by Redstone on its sides. Wiggling intensely may cause motion sickness.
block.rocketnautics.booster_thruster.too: A metal tube filled with 'safety-tested' chemicals. Jeb's favorite seat.
rocketnautics.tooltip.booster_thruster.e: Needs Coal blocks. Redstone activated. Do not use as a desk lamp.
block.rocketnautics.separator.tooltip.sh: Essentially a controlled explosion. Hopefully, only the parts you want will fall off.
rocketnautics.tooltip.separator.extra: Instantly disappears with Redstone. Warranty void if used as a structural support.
block.rocketnautics.rcs_thruster.tooltip: Shoots air. Engineers call it compressed gas, but we all know it's just sucking the oxygen out of the cabin.
rocketnautics.tooltip.rcs_thruster.extra: Requires no fuel. 100N fixed thrust. Redstone activated. High precision, low power.
block.rocketnautics.gyroscope.tooltip.sh: A rapidly spinning wheel that hates change. Keeps your rocket pointed where it should be.
rocketnautics.tooltip.gyroscope.extra: Stability Augmentation System (SAS). Dampens angular velocity when powered by Redstone.
item.rocketnautics.music_disc_space.tool: We noticed our employee playing some game. We fired him, but we liked the music.
rocketnautics.ponder.rocket_thruster.tex: Rocket Thrusters provide powerful propulsion for your crafts.
You can adjust the thrust power using the value slider.
The engine activates when fuel is pumped into it. Adjust pump RPM to control thrust.
Warning: The exhaust is extremely hot! It will melt blocks and damage entities.
The engine must be attached to a Fluid Tank to function.
Fill the tank with Lava to provide fuel for the thruster.
